label: MAVLink AI - 24 Parameter Browser Web UI
info: Optional dependency-free parameter browser at /mavlink-ai/parameters. List/read/set operations run through mavlink-ai-param. Set requires literal SET confirmation. Protect Node-RED HTTP endpoints with httpNodeAuth and never expose this flow directly to an untrusted network.

name: Open /mavlink-ai/parameters — protect HTTP nodes and test changes in SITL
info: Setting parameters can make a vehicle unsafe or unbootable. The UI requires SET confirmation, but authentication and network exposure remain the operator's responsibility.

name: Read browser state
Validate and acknowledge request
Store parameter result
Store parameter progress
func: const state = flow.get('mavlinkAiParamBrowser') || { params: [] }; const p=msg.payload||{}; state.progress=p.count!=null?`Receiving parameters ${p.received||0}/${p.count}`:(p.state||'working'); state.updatedAt=Date.now(); flow.set('mavlinkAiParamBrowser',state); return null;

name: Store parameter error
func: const state = flow.get('mavlinkAiParamBrowser') || { params: [] }; state.message=(msg.payload&&msg.payload.message)||'Parameter operation failed'; state.progress=''; state.error=msg.payload; state.updatedAt=Date.now(); flow.set('mavlinkAiParamBrowser',state); return msg;
